name: vibeprospecting-plugin
description: Explorium prospecting via a vendored vibep CLI backed by an MCP token gateway. Autocomplete filters, run stats, fetch previews, match CSV/JSON inputs, enrich ids, and inspect events.

mcp_servers.name: explorium-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Explorium MCP token gateway. Provides get-auth-token to resolve an API key for the vibep CLI.
